problem id: 8e96d488
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(6) XOR SHR(4)

examples:
  01111001 -> 01000111
  01010001 -> 01000101
  00001011 -> 11000000
  10101110 -> 10001010
  10010010 -> 10001001
  01011010 -> 10000101
  00100011 -> 11000010
  00000110 -> 10000000
  10111011 -> 11001011
  11101001 -> 01001110

query: 10100000
predicted answer: 00001010
